title: concept: WCT depo-to-frame simulation pipeline
description: Standard WCT pipeline pattern for running LArTPC simulation: read depositions from file, drift electrons, apply field response and electronics simulation, digitize, add noise, write frames. Node sequence: DepoFileSource → DepoSetDrifter → DuctorFramer (or Ductor+FrameFanin) → Digitizer → AddNoise → FrameFileSink. All wired in Jsonnet; run with 'wire-cell -p WireCellGen -p WireCellSio -p WireCellTbb -V input=depos.tar.bz2 -V output=frames.tar.bz2 config.jsonnet'. The Drifter xregions and Ductor field response files are detector-specific — use cfg/pgrapher/experiment/<detector>/ configs as the starting point rather than building from scratch. Working example: cfg/pgrapher/experiment/dune-vd/wct-depo-sim-fans.jsonnet.

title: WireCellGen::AddNoise (IncoherentAddNoise)
description: Component in wire-cell-toolkit/gen that adds incoherent (per-channel uncorrelated) noise to frames. Implements IFrameFilter. Key config params: rng, dft (e.g. FftwDFT), model (IChannelNoiseDatabase reference, e.g. EmpiricalNoiseModel), nsamples, replacement_percentage. Type name may be 'AddNoise' or 'IncoherentAddNoise'.

title: WireCellGen::DuctorFramer
description: Component in wire-cell-toolkit/gen that wraps an IDuctor to produce frames from a depo stream. Implements IDepoFramer. Key config params: ductor (type:name of IDuctor implementation), fanin (type:name of IFrameFanin to merge partial frames). The Ductor itself requires detector-specific field response files and anode geometry.

title: WireCellGen::Digitizer
description: Component in wire-cell-toolkit/gen that converts analog waveform frames to ADC integer frames. Implements IFrameFilter. Key config params: anode (IAnodePlane reference), resolution (ADC bits, e.g. 12), gain, fullscale ([min,max] voltage range), baselines (per-plane baseline voltages), round (bool), frame_tag.

title: WireCellGen::Drifter
description: Component in wire-cell-toolkit/gen that drifts ionization electrons from deposition positions to the anode response plane. Implements IDrifter. Key config params: rng, DL (longitudinal diffusion cm²/s), DT (transverse diffusion cm²/s), lifetime (electron lifetime ms), drift_speed, xregions (array of {anode, cathode, response} positions — detector-specific, REQUIRED). Also: fluctuate, time_offset, charge_scale.

title: WireCellGen::DepoSetDrifter
description: Component in wire-cell-toolkit/gen that wraps a Drifter to handle the IDepoSetFilter interface (DepoSet in, DepoSet out). Key config param: drifter (type:name reference to a Drifter instance). Used when the upstream node produces DepoSets rather than individual IDepos.

title: WireCellSio::DepoFileSource
description: Component in wire-cell-toolkit/sio that reads depositions from a tar file (supports .tar, .tar.gz, .tar.bz2). Implements IDepoSetSource. Key config params: inname (input file path), scale (charge scale factor, default 1.0). Used as the source node in simulation pipelines.

title: WireCellSio::FrameFileSink
description: Component in wire-cell-toolkit/sio that writes frames to a tar file (supports .tar, .tar.gz, .tar.bz2). Implements IFrameSink and ITerminal. Key config params: outname, tags (list of frame tags to save, '*' = all), digitize (bool: 16-bit int vs 32-bit float), baseline, scale, offset, masks, dense (optional dense output range). Used as the sink node in simulation pipelines.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/root → wire-cell-toolkit/gen
description: Edge: root depends on gen for simulation data types needed by ROOT I/O (e.g., CelltreeSource reading simulation output).

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/root → wire-cell-toolkit/sigproc
description: Edge: root depends on sigproc for signal processing data types needed by ROOT I/O (e.g., MagnifySource/Sink for sigproc output).

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/clus → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: clus depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/zio → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: zio depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/pgraph → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: pgraph depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/triton → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: triton depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/pytorch → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: pytorch depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/gen → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: gen depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/sio → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: sio depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/img → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: img depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/tbb → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: tbb depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/sig → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: sig depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/sigproc → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: sigproc depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/hio → wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: Edge: hio depends on aux for concrete data type implementations and helper utilities.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/iface → wire-cell-toolkit/util
description: Edge: iface depends on util for base Interface class, NamedFactory, Units, Configuration, and core data structures.

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/apps → wire-cell-toolkit/iface
description: Edge: apps depends on iface for all abstract component types used by the CLI (wire-cell, wcsonnet, wcwires).

title: USES: wire-cell-toolkit/aux → wire-cell-toolkit/iface
description: Edge: aux implements the iface abstract types (SimpleFrame, SimpleDepoSet, SimpleBlob, etc.) and provides utility functions on those types.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/cuda
description: CUDA GPU acceleration placeholder package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Currently contains minimal test/placeholder code for future GPU-accelerated components. No significant public API yet. External dep: CUDA toolkit (optional). No WCT-internal dependencies.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/waft
description: Custom Waf build tool extensions for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Python build tooling (wcb.py, etc.) providing convention-based package building: auto-discovers inc/, src/, app/, test/ directories. Not a C++ library. Used by all packages.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/cfg
description: Jsonnet configuration files package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Not a C++ library. Contains reference processing chain configurations for supported experiments (uboone, icarus, dune, etc.) under cfg/pgrapher/experiment/. Installed via --install-config= build option.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/zio
description: ZeroMQ/ZIO distributed messaging integration package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Enables distributed multi-process data flow via ZeroMQ messaging. Components: TensorSetSource/Sink, ZioTorchScript, FlowConfigurable, TensUtil. External dep: ZIO/ZeroMQ (optional). Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/clus
description: Advanced clustering algorithms package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Builds point trees and tracking structures, convex hull geometry (via quickhull submodule), blob ensemble processing, spatial graph structures. Components: PRGraph, Facade, PointTreeBuilding, SimpleClusGeomHelper, BlobSampler, IEnsembleVisitor, TrackFitting. Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/triton
description: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server integration package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Enables distributed ML model serving via gRPC to a Triton server. Components: TritonService. External dep: Triton client libs (optional). Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/hio
description: HDF5 I/O integration package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Provides HDF5-based file I/O for frame data. Components: HDF5FrameTap. External dep: HDF5 (optional). Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/sig
description: 2D spectral deconvolution filtering package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Provides 2D deconvolution filters (spectral domain) for enhanced signal processing beyond 1D. Components: Decon2DFilter, Decon2DResponse, Util. Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/sio
description: File I/O and serialization package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. No ROOT dependency. Sources/sinks for frames, depos, clusters, tensors to files; includes NumPy (.npy/.npz) support. Components: FrameFileSource/Sink, DepoFileSource/Sink, ClusterFileSource/Sink, NumpyDepoSaver, TensorFileSource/Sink. Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/pytorch
description: Neural network inference package for Wire-Cell Toolkit via libtorch (C++ PyTorch). Enables torch script loading and inference, DFT operations via libtorch. Components: TorchContext, TorchScript, TorchService, DNNROIFinding, DFT, Util. External dep: libtorch (optional). Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/root
description: ROOT framework integration package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Provides ROOT-based I/O sources and sinks; the only core package with multiple WCT-internal deps. Components: CelltreeSource, CelltreeFrameSink, HistFrameSink, MagnifySource/Sink, UbooneTTrees. External dep: ROOT (optional). Depends on: aux, gen, sigproc.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/img
description: 3D imaging and reconstruction package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Implements blob clustering/solving, geometry clustering, grid tiling, point graph processing, and charge reconstruction. Components: BlobClustering, BlobSolving, PointGraphProcessor, GridTiling, GlobalGeomClustering, BlobDepoFill, ChargeErrorEstimator, SlicesSink. Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/pgraph
description: Single-threaded data flow graph execution engine (Pgrapher) for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Implements the data flow programming paradigm with a single-threaded, low-memory execution policy. Components: Pgrapher, Graph, Node, Port, Factory, Wrappers. Corresponds to the 'Pgrapher' app name in WCT configuration. Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/sigproc
description: Signal processing package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Provides channel response models, signal filtering, deconvolution (Omnibus), noise databases, and detector-specific implementations (Microboone, Icarus, DuneCrp). Components: ChannelSelector, FrameMerger, FilterResponse, ChannelResponse, HfFilter, LfFilter. Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/tbb
description: Multi-threaded data flow graph execution engine (TbbFlow) for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Implements concurrent data flow via Intel oneAPI TBB (Threading Building Blocks). Components: TbbFlow, DataFlowGraph, FunctionCat, NodeWrapper, SourceCat, SinkCat, FanoutCat, FaninCat, JoinCat, QueuedoutCat. External dep: TBB 2021.1.1+. Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/gen
description: Simulation and data generation package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Implements the LArTPC simulation pipeline: charge deposition (Drifter, BinnedDiffusion), convolution with detector field responses (DuctorFramer), ADC digitization (Digitizer), noise generation (UncorrelatedAddNoise), DepoFanout, DepoFilter, DepoCollector, DepoFramer. Depends on: aux.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/util
description: Foundational utility package for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Provides Point, Units system, Configuration (Jsonnet-based), NamedFactory/Interface plugin patterns, and core data structures: Waveform, Array (Eigen-backed), Binning, Graph. No WCT-internal dependencies — all other packages depend on this.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/iface
description: Abstract interface definitions for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Defines 130+ abstract base classes for all major WCT data types and processing node categories: IFrame, IDepo, IBlob, ICluster, ITensor, IWire, IChannel, ISlice, IAnodeFace; node types ISourceNode, ISinkNode, IFanout, IFanin, IFunctionNode. Depends on: util.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/apps
description: CLI applications and application framework for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Provides wire-cell (main CLI), wcsonnet (Jsonnet processor), wcwires (wire geometry viewer), and the Main class for policy-free application bootstrapping. Also: ConfigDumper, NodeDumper, AnodeDumper, SchemaDumper. Depends on: iface.

title: wire-cell-toolkit/aux
description: General-purpose implementations hub for Wire-Cell Toolkit. Implements common IData interfaces (SimpleFrame, SimpleDepoSet, SimpleBlob, SimpleSlice, SimpleCluster); provides FrameTools, TensorDM, ClusterHelpers, BlobTools, BlobShadow. Acts as the critical interconnect point — almost all domain packages depend on aux rather than directly on iface. Depends on: iface.

title: SCANNED: scan:wire-cell-toolkit-package-2026-05-18 → repo:wire-cell-toolkit
description: Edge: package-level scan of wire-cell-toolkit performed on 2026-05-18. Scope: all top-level packages. Granularity: package-level (README, public headers, wscript_build). Process: automated via Explore subagent reading inc/, src/, README.org, wscript_build per package.

title: scan: wire-cell-toolkit package-level 2026-05-18
description: Package-level scan of wire-cell-toolkit. Scope: all top-level packages — purpose, public API, inter-package dependencies. Granularity: package-level (README, headers, wscript_build per package). Date: 2026-05-18.

title: wire-cell-toolkit
description: Source code repository for the Wire-Cell Toolkit (https://github.com/wirecell/wire-cell-toolkit). Primary repository under study in this ask-repo knowledge base.
